title: ilex suprema
intro: Ilex suprema, also known as Chinese Holly or Japanese Holly, is a type of holly plant native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex suprema include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and promoting digestive health. Ilex suprema is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine practices.
